texto: Don't rely on someone else for your happiness and self-worth. Only you can be responsible for that. If you can't love and respect yourself - no one else will be able to make that happen. Accept who you are - completely
autor: the good and the bad - and make changes as YOU see fit - not because you think someone else wants you to be different.
explicacao: Citação de the good and the bad - and make changes as YOU see fit - not because you think someone else wants you to be different. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Don't rely on someone else for your happiness and self-worth. Only you can be responsible for tha…” articula autoestima, stacey-charter, reflexao em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
